The [[Ikas-Adno/Legends|Ikas-Adno]] '''22-B Nightfalcon''' was a versatile [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]], suitable for city navigation, racing, and military and security uses. It could carry one passenger in addition to the pilot and held four kilograms of cargo.
It cost 6,250 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] when new.<ref name="RPG2" />

It was one of Ikas-Adno's most popular models. It was not as fast as Aratech's [[74-Y speeder bike]] or [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bike]], but offered a good mix of speed and strength that owners appreciated.<ref name="UR">''[[The Unknown Regions]]''</ref>

Known users include former podracer [[Ree]].
